hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [ -f node_modules/.bin/prettier ] && node_modules/.bin/prettier --write "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$' && [ -f node_modules/.bin/eslint ] && node_modules/.bin/eslint --fix "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
